hotel_name: Sunora Villa Hội An (Sunora Villa Hoi An)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Very poor hosts

reviews.title: Nice service, nice location, wonderful staffs.
reviews.positives: The two front desk ladies are amazingly friendly and supportive. They gave me some tips for local foodie, helped me with direction, bicycle ride (free rented bicycle) . The pool is small but warm, I enjoyed the morning swim.  The location is amazing, just between the An Bang beach and the Old town Hoi An (10mins by bicycle) . I really enjoyed my stay there!
reviews.negatives: Not really.

reviews.title: I want to sleep in.
reviews.text:
Location: Moving around is fairly easy (approximately 2-3 km distance).
Staff: Very friendly. They also provide information on local restaurants.
Indoor pool: Claimed to be cleaned daily, so it is clean.
Room condition: Overall very good.
However, if you value a quiet rest, it might be worth reconsidering the rooms on the first floor.
The pool is right in front, so the atmosphere can be quite lively depending on the time of day.
Also, the structure is close to the garden, which adds a nature-friendly (?) element.
reviews.response:
Cảm ơn bạn đã chia sẻ trải nghiệm !
Rất vui vì bạn hài lòng với vị trí, sự sạch sẽ và sự hỗ trợ của đội ngũ. Bọn mình cũng ghi nhận góp ý về độ yên tĩnh và sẽ cố gắng cải thiện tốt hơn. Hy vọng được đón bạn quay lại trong thời gian tới!
Sunora Villa Team.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nice and comfortable room with a pleasant atmosphere. The staff provided friendly and attentive customer service. I would definitely recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Basically, compared to the price range.
reviews.text:
My friend and I work in the hotel service industry in Hanoi and in Hoi An as well, and we hesitated about whether to write a review because I also do not want to express things I am not satisfied with. But I will go ahead and say it in the hope that the villa can improve.

On the positive side, the location is very convenient, close to the Old Quarter, the beach, and other entertainment spots, the staff is enthusiastic, and the amenities are complete.

However, what made me feel extremely uncomfortable and can be described as a terrible experience is the condition of the rooms – the most important aspect that the villa is using for business.

Regarding the bed: I am not sure if the housekeeping department or the room cleaning process actually requires changing the linens when new guests check into the room, but when I checked, it was not very clean. There was “HAIR” and lots of “LONG HAIR” stuck all over the bed. My hair is currently red, so the hair on the bed is long (possibly from a woman) and black, meaning it definitely isn't mine. As for the hair, it is a sensitive topic that I would rather not delve into, but it surely doesn’t belong to me or my friend.

About the bathroom: The shower area was not clean, with many stains on the wall/glass that had been there for a long time; the sink and underneath the sink were the same (if you sit on the toilet and look, you will see). In general, there were many unpleasant things I noticed, and one thing I really wonder is: “Is it because I paid a relatively cheap price that I only deserve such conditions?” or “Is this considered clean for them?” But when you are in the service industry and want to maximize your offerings, you need to provide customers with the best possible experience, not something so careless.

Flooring: It is old, with many visible stains (scratches) on the floor (I won't elaborate much on this issue because renovation would require a lot of time and upfront costs).

Each time I enter the room, I have to take off my glasses so I don't have to see anything clearly, and whenever I imagine coming back to the room after going out, I think “Oh, do I have to go back to that room again?”

I don't want to take photos of all the things I mentioned above because it has already been too upsetting for me, and I don’t want to keep those images and many other sensitive matters. Moreover, since it's close to my birthday, I just want to preserve the most beautiful things.

Currently in Hoi An, I see that this is not peak season, and if even the most basic things are not done well, then what to expect? I hope the facility will accept this feedback and make improvements.
reviews.response:
Cảm ơn bạn đã chia sẻ rất thẳng thắn và chi tiết. Bên mình thật sự xin lỗi vì những trải nghiệm chưa tốt về vệ sinh phòng ốc đã làm bạn không thoải mái, đặc biệt trong dịp sinh nhật. Bên mình đã ghi nhận góp ý và làm việc lại với bộ phận liên quan để cải thiện ngay. Hy vọng sẽ có dịp được đón bạn quay lại và mang đến trải nghiệm tốt hơn.
Trân trọng.
Sunora Villa Team.

reviews.title: Best Value Stay in Vietnam.
reviews.positives:
My husband and I stayed at Sunora Villa for one night, and it was fantastic!
The room was surprisingly spacious — even larger than our rooms in two different five-star hotels in Vietnam. The bed was huge and extremely comfortable, and there was plenty of space for my morning yoga. Everything was brand new and clean.

reviews.title: Location & private pool
reviews.text: Nice Villa 1.8 kms from old town, easy to cab in or walk.  Any issues were fixed within a day.  Very friendly staff, always smiling and helpful

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Very much like.
reviews.text: The location is in the suburbs, but the hotel offers free bicycles to ride to the ancient town (about 15 minutes). There are a couple of shops nearby to eat (especially a vegetarian restaurant, which is very delicious), and because it's in the suburbs, it’s not as crowded with tourists like the ancient town, nor is it as noisy as staying in the city. The hotel is very quiet, and there is always someone at the front desk watching over things, so it feels very safe. The staff is super nice and very enthusiastic, recommending me many local snacks, for which I am very grateful.
reviews.response:
非常感謝您喜歡並分享在我們 villa 的住宿體驗 💛
我們很高興您滿意安靜的環境、便利的地點以及員工的熱心服務。

期待未來再次歡迎您回到 Sunora Villa Hội An 🌿

敬上，
Sunora Villa Team

reviews.title: Great.
reviews.positives: We had such a lovely time at Sunora. The villa is beautiful, very calm and full of light. It felt like a hidden gem in Hoi An. The staffs are soooo nice.

reviews.title: Perfect villa for family
reviews.text: This villa was perfect for our family! Plenty of space, very clean, and well-maintained. It felt safe, comfortable, and truly homey. Breakfast was Vietnamese-style only, and it was super good. However, it would be great if simple Western breakfast options—such as eggs, bread, etc.—could also be made available, especially for kids. We enjoyed every moment of our stay!
reviews.response:
Dear Jennifer & Family.
Thank you very much for your lovely and detailed review 💛
We’re delighted to hear that the villa was a perfect fit for your family and that you enjoyed the spacious, clean, safe, and homey atmosphere. It’s also wonderful to know that you loved our Vietnamese-style breakfast.
Thank you for your thoughtful suggestion regarding simple Western breakfast options such as eggs and bread, especially for children. We truly appreciate your feedback and will certainly take it into consideration as we continue improving our services.
It was a pleasure hosting you, and we hope to welcome you and your family back again in the future. Wishing you many more happy travels!
Best regards
Sunora Villa Team.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
A hidden gem in Hoi An!
My stay at Sunora Villa Hoi An was truly unforgettable. The villa is tucked away in a lush, green setting that instantly makes you feel at ease. Everything was spotless, and the serene atmosphere made it the perfect escape from the bustle of the town. I especially loved to the pool—it was the perfect way to unwind after a day of exploring. My room was spacious, beautifully designed, and incredibly comfortable. I can’t wait to come back!

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: The location between the ancient town of Hoi An and An Bang beach is convenient for travel. The staff is friendly, and the wifi is good. Although there were some minor issues with the amenities such as (the bathroom having a centipede, an old and weak hairdryer), overall it was still quite comfortable and pleasant.

reviews.title: Recomendable
reviews.positives: Estaba todo muy limpio y la piscina muy bonita. La habitación corresponde con la de las fotos, es muy amplia y cómoda.
reviews.negatives: La recepcionista era muy invasiva intentando vendernos todo tipo de tours cuando le dijimos en muchas ocasiones que no queríamos hacer ningún tour. Por otro lado, quisimos hacer una noche más y nos la cobró a mismo precio de booking (en otras estancias te descuentan el porcentaje que se queda la plataforma de booking que es entre un 15% y un 20%). Esto significa que ese porcentaje se lo quedó ella al no modificar la reserva en la app.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: This place was recommended by a friend. We’re a group of 7 and booked 3 rooms for 5 days. We all had a nice stay and the staff were all very accommodating. They replied fast to my inquiries and also suggested places to eat nearby. Rooms are clean. There are no elevators so we carried our luggages to our rooms (third flood). Some restaurants and grocery stores are walking distance. But if you’re going to Old Town you will need to book a grab. Getting one is easy and the fare is cheap. Overall, we all had a great stay. :)
reviews.response:
Dear Jaire,

Thank you very much for your wonderful review and for choosing to stay with us. We’re so happy to hear that you and your group had a pleasant stay and that our team could assist you with your inquiries and local recommendations.

We appreciate your understanding about the stairs, and we’re glad the rooms, location, and service met your expectations. It was truly a pleasure hosting all of you.

We hope to welcome you back again on your next visit to Hoi An!

Warm regards,
Sunora Villa Team

reviews.title: Repetiría
reviews.positives:
Una estancia maravillosa! Muy agradables los dueños. Te ayudan con todo! Súper bien ubicado. Ni en la playa ni en el centro! Perfecto
Cerca hay sitios para desayunar (300m aproximadamente)

reviews.title: Fantastic all around
reviews.text: Great new villa with wonderful Staff, a made to order breakfast (Banana Pancakes and Crepes best we’ve ever had) and clean modern rooms. Beds are comfy and towels are fluffy and soft!!  We’ll be sure to stay again on our next visit to Hoi An. Thanks for making us feel so welcome.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Tracey era muy simpática y ayudaba bastante, habitaciones amplias, la cama muy cómoda.
reviews.negatives: En el baño que tenía después de ducharse una persona empezaba a salir agua más fría. Faltaba más luz en la habitación

reviews.title: Sunora Villa
reviews.text: The villa is very chill and clean. The staff is also very nice. We had a complete trip to Hoi An thanks to booking Sunora Villa.
reviews.response:
Cảm ơn các bạn rất nhiều vì đã lựa chọn Sunora Villa cho chuyến đi Hội An của mình ❤️
Sunora rất vui khi biết các bạn đã có trải nghiệm thoải mái và trọn vẹn tại villa. Những lời khen về không gian và nhân viên là động lực rất lớn đối với đội ngũ của chúng tôi.

Hy vọng sẽ sớm được chào đón các bạn quay lại Sunora Villa trong những kỳ nghỉ tiếp theo!
Sunora Villa Team

reviews.title: Passer votre chemin
reviews.positives: J'avais réservé pour avoir un billard et une piscine. Les équipements étaient bien présents, en revanche, pour le prix de la location, la qualité du logement en soi laisse à désirer.
reviews.negatives:
-La villa n'était pas propre: sol pas lavé, des bêtes collés sur le plafond du salon et des chambres en masse, cuisine pas nettoyé 
-La villa n'est pas entretenue, donc ancienne
-L'espace commun n'est pas convivial, c'est l'accueil de l'hôtel. Difficile pour profiter en famille. 

Il y a des villas dans les alentours de Hoi An bien moins chers et beaucoup plus spacieux, neuves et entretenues.

Je ne recommande pas pour le prix que c'est.

reviews.title: The room is clean, the service quality is good, and it is worth the price.
reviews.text: The room is clean, well-equipped, and the staff is very helpful. The villa offers free bicycle rentals. The swimming pool is clean and beautiful. Special thanks to the enthusiastic support of Mr. Tien and Ms. Thu.
reviews.response:
Sunora cảm ơn hai bạn Phương - Hương đã lựa chọn Sunora cho chuyến du lịch Hội An vừa qua.

Rất vui khi mọi người hài lòng với chất lượng tại Sunora & mọi người tại đây.

Hẹn gặp hai bạn lần sau khi đến Hội An lại nhé.

Sunora Villa Hoi An

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Tout,le personnel,les chambres,l’emplacement .
Tout était parfait.
Nous espérons y retourner dès que possible !
reviews.negatives: RAS

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Beautiful hotel, pleasant atmosphere. What I liked most was the two receptionists who were extremely friendly and provided very attentive support to the guests. I will definitely come back next time!
reviews.response: Sunora Villa cảm ơn chị Phương Anh đã chọn Sunora cho kì nghỉ của mình Chúc chị thật nhiều sức khỏe,hẹn gặp lại chị sớm. Sunora villa Team!

reviews.title: Hôtel au top à Hoi An
reviews.positives: Le personnel, la piscine, les chambres

reviews.title: Quiet and Peaceful Stay
reviews.text: Thank you Luna, Tyler, and team taking such good care of me during my stay. It was a comfortable stay and I enjoyed every bit it. Everywhere is clean in the villa and the pool is awesome. Will be back again for sure. It's located at a quiet neighborhood not too far from the old town centre. Old town is at a walking distance easily reachable. If you prefer some place more quiet yet still near to good mix of local restaurants or restaurants that are more foreginer-friendly, bars, local places to have drinks and chill, good traditional vietnamese coffee, Fit Nation Gym Hoi An, Winmart+, etc., this is your place to stay.
reviews.response:
Dear Jor.

Thank you so much for taking the time to share such a lovely review! We’re really happy to hear that you enjoyed your stay with us and felt comfortable throughout your visit.

It’s wonderful that you liked our quiet neighborhood and found the location convenient for exploring the Old Town and nearby local spots. Luna, Tyler, and the whole team truly appreciate your kind words — it means a lot to us.

We can’t wait to welcome you back to Sunora Villa again soon! 💛

Warm regards,
Sunora Villa Team

reviews.title: Super !
reviews.positives: L’établissement est bien situé, à 10 minutes à scooter de la plage et de la vieille ville. Les chambres sont grandes. Le patron Tyler est très sympathique et le personnel Lunaa, Mio et lee se sont toujours démenées pour rendre notre séjour plus agréable.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The room is clean, airy, the staff is enthusiastic, the space is spacious and beautiful.

reviews.title: Séjour très agréable
reviews.positives: Gentillesse et compétences du personnel
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The owner and staff are enthusiastic. The room is clean and spacious. The room rate is reasonable. It's great overall. Two of us stayed on the night of May 30 in room 301.

reviews.title: Meilleur hôtel de Hoi An
reviews.positives:
Le meilleur hôtel de Hoi An !
Le personnel adorable, la piscine agréable et les chambres propres. 
Je recommande vivement !
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Too perfect, there's nothing to criticize.

reviews.title: Belle chambre, bon service.
reviews.positives: La chambre est très spacieuse, propre et aérée ! Il y a une jolie piscine, idéale pour se détendre. Le personnel est adorable et enthousiaste, et les habitants de Hoi An sont charmants. Je suis très satisfait du service et de la chambre, elle vaut largement mon prix !

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text:
➕ -Spotlessly clean room
-Delicious breakfast and cheap
-Extremely friendly and helpful staff who made our stay in Hoi An very relaxing, the best staff we've had while travelling Asia for 3 months!
-Great location and would recommend to anyone looking to visit Hoi An

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Établissement propre et personnel très sympathique et disponible

reviews.title: Perfect hotel
reviews.text:
What a wonderful hotel. The hotel is small, charming, and located in a peaceful setting. The rooms are clean, very spacious, and have a lovely balcony.
A big thank you to the staff, especially the young woman who welcomed me when I arrived (unfortunately, I didn’t ask for her name 😞). Everyone is incredibly caring and attentive, always doing their best to make our stay as pleasant as possible.
I highly recommend this hotel in every way — 10/10. There is absolutely nothing to improve, and I would gladly come back 😊.
Thank you to the entire Sunora Villa team 🤍
reviews.response:
Dear Mounira

Thank you so much for your wonderful review and for choosing Sunora Villa.

Your kind words are a great motivation for our team. We truly appreciate your recommendation and hope to welcome you back again soon.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Endroit idéal pour séjourner à Hoi An. Ambiance chaleureuse et agréable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Très bon hôtel 
Personnel Très gentil, a l'écoute et de bons conseils 
Chambre grande et confortable
Proche de la vieille ville 
Je recommande !
reviews.response:
Merci beaucoup pour votre gentil commentaire 😊
Nous sommes ravis que vous ayez apprécié votre séjour, ainsi que notre équipe, la chambre et l’emplacement proche de la vieille ville.

Ce fut un plaisir de vous accueillir et nous espérons vous revoir bientôt à Sunora Villa

reviews.title: Super séjour
reviews.positives:
Petit hotel, bien placé et propre.
Merci particulièrement à Linh c'est  une belle personne très serviable mais le reste de l'équipe est aussi au petit soin avec les touristes.
reviews.negatives: Qu'il ne propose pas de petit déjeuner

reviews.title: Hidden gem
reviews.text: Nous avions adoré notre séjour ici et nous avions même prolonger notre séjour ici. Le logement est bien situé, entre la plage et le ''ancient town'' c'était parfait pour relaxer le matin et faire une balade le soir. Nous avons utilisés les bicyclettes, qui sont gratuites, pendant plusieurs jours pour nos sorties. Tout s'est bien déroulé depuis l'accueil jusqu'à notre départ grâce au personnel! Un grand merci aux employés. Je recommande!
reviews.response:
Thank you so much for sharing your lovely experience at Sunora Villa!
We’re happy to hear you enjoyed a relaxing stay, our location, free bikes, and the support from our team.
Hope to welcome you back again soon!

Sunora Villa Team

reviews.title: Super expérience à Hoi An, merci Tien !
reviews.positives: Bon service, Tien est très serviable et amical. Il nous a montré un très bon tailleur à Hoi An. La villa est vraiment belle

reviews.title: Un petit havre de paix ❤️
reviews.text:
Petit havre de paix situé un peu excentré du bruyant hoi an, ce qui permet réellement de recharger les batteries ! La piscine est très charmante. Le personnel est très accueillant et souriant. Nous avons eu la possibilité d’avoir le check-in plus tôt : un vrai gros plus après un bus couchette. Le service de laundry est également très appréciable.
Nous recommandons très fortement ❤️

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: La villa offre un cadre très paisible et reposant. Le personnel est particulièrement chaleureux et accueillant.

reviews.title: Hoi An
reviews.text:
+ : Personal, Zimmer, Lage, Leihräder

O : Die Räder sind ohne Gangschaltung und nicht auf etwas größere Menschen einzustellen, aber besser, als alles zu Fuß zu erkunden!

- : /

reviews.title: Parfait
reviews.positives: Nous avons tellement aimé notre séjour à Sunora Villa que nous l’avons prolongé de trois semaines ! Le logement est super bien situé, entre la vieille ville et la plage. Tous est accessible à vélo, en moins de 15 minutes. Le plus beau à hoi an serait de prendre le vélo pour s’aventurer dans les petites ruelles avant même d’arriver à la vieille ville, nous le recommandons ! La piscine est plus que nécessaire, très agréable en été. La chambre est spacieuse, le lit confortable. La connexion internet est excellente au second étage. Enfin, l’équipe est plus qu’adorable, nous aimerions revenir un jour. Nous sommes très reconnaissants car ils ont tout fait pour que nous passions un bon séjour.
reviews.negatives: En trois semaines il est normal qu’il ait des petits ajustements à faire, tout à été entendu et pris en compte par l’équipe. Ils ont à chaque fois trouvé une solution pour nous aider. Merci milles fois.

reviews.title: Perfekte Location
reviews.text: Hier stimmt wirklich alles. Besonders hervorheben möchte ich Luna und die  crew. Sie haben meinen Offenthalt zu einem tollen Erlebnis gemacht. Vielen Dank dafür.
reviews.response:
Vielen Dank für Ihre wunderbare Bewertung !
Wir werden Ihr Lob gerne an Luna und das gesamte Team weiterleiten. Wir freuen uns darauf, Sie in Zukunft wieder bei uns begrüßen zu dürfen

reviews.title: Tolles modernes sauberes Hotel
reviews.positives: Die Unterkunft ist sehr modern, sauber und ruhig gelegen. Das Personal ist super nett und hat uns viele Tipps für Ausflüge gegeben sowie uns ein Taxi früh morgens zum Flughafen organisiert. Immer gerne wieder!

reviews.title: 舒適及優秀的民宿
reviews.text: 民宿主人非常之友善，樂於解答我們的問題。房間整潔。
reviews.response:
Sunora 衷心感谢两位选择 Sunora Villa 作为这次旅行的入住地点 

希望在未来的旅途中，能够很快再次欢迎两位回来入住

reviews.title: Blijf hier weg als je wilt slapen
reviews.positives: Mooie en nette kamers. Zwembad was goed onderhouden en mooi.
reviews.negatives: Kamer was erg klein. Toen wij er verbleven waren er erg veel jongeren in het hotel die elke nacht tot 4/5u ‘s ochtends poolparty’s hielden. Na meermaals dit te zeggen aan het personeel deden zij hier niets aan. In de regels van het hotel staat nochtans dat het zwembad gesloten is ‘s nachts en dat het na 10 uur stil moet zijn. Dan boek je een hotel war verder van de stad, maar slapen zat er helaas niet in voor ons 😢

reviews.title: מושלםםם
reviews.text:
קבענו 2 לילות ונשארנו כמעט לעוד שבוע שלם 
נפלנו על זמן קצת לא טוב של הצפות מטורפות 
והמלון היה ככ נחמד דאג לנו להכל הבחורה בקבלה פשוט מתוקה מאוד 
בלילה הראשון היה לנו בעיה בחדר והעבירו אותנו לחדר גדול יותר 
השהות הייתה מהממת רחוק מהמרכז
reviews.response:
Thank you so much for your kind review!
We’re happy to know you enjoyed your stay despite the weather. Our team truly appreciates your understanding and kind words. Hope to welcome you back again soon! 
Sunora Villa Team

reviews.title: Heerlijk verblijf in Hoi An!
reviews.positives: Heel aardig personeel, ruime kamer, locatie super, precies tussen het strand en de stad in. Ik vond het heel fijn dat ze fietsen hadden waar je gratis gebruik van kon maken! Zwembad is klein maar fijn. Je krijgt elke dag gratis water. Je kan ontbijten, lunchen en avond eten (dat kan je bestellen) bij hen. Ik heb daar zelf geen gebruik van gemaakt. Ze regelde een taxi voor mij na mn vlucht, erg fijn en handig! Ze zijn ook flexibel, ik kon mn verblijf zo verlengen met een nacht. Communicatie via WhatsApp is heel handig!
reviews.negatives: De badkamer was wel wat ouderwets. De ramen en balkon deuren gingen niet heel soepel open. Het kluisje werkte niet in mijn kamer. Personeel spreekt wel engels, maar soms echt heel lastig te verstaan. Daardoor heb ik sommige dingen ook niet goed begrepen. Of duurde dat wat langer voordat ik hen begreep of zij mij (haha). Maar dit zijn allemaal minimale dingen, het was een super fijn verblijf!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Nhân viên thân thiện
reviews.response:
Sunora chân thành cảm ơn anh/chị rất nhiều vì đã chọn Sunora Villa cho kì nghỉ vừa rồi 
Hy vọng sẽ sớm được chào đón anh/chị quay trở lại trong những chuyến đi tiếp theo ạ.

reviews.title: Charmant en een goede prijs-kwaliteitverhouding.
reviews.positives:
Nieuw gebouwd hotel met een klein maar erg fijn zwembad. De kamer was ruim, schoon, goed uitgerust en zeer comfortabel en rustig!
Vriendelijk personeel, uitstekende service.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.response:
Sunora Villa cảm ơn chị Phương đã chọn Sunora cho kì nghỉ của mình
Chúc chị thật nhiều sức khỏe,hẹn gặp lại chị sớm.
Sunora villa Team!

reviews.title: Perfecte plek om te werken en tot rust te komen in Hoi An!
reviews.positives: Ik verbleef bij Sunora toen ik op afstand werkte en het was een fantastische plek. Het personeel was supervriendelijk en altijd bereid om te helpen. Er hing gewoon een heel relaxte, comfortabele sfeer. Ik zou hier zeker weer verblijven als ik terug in Hoi An ben.

reviews.title: Quá ấn tượng về chất lượng và dịch vụ
reviews.text: Ở đây chắc chắn là trải nghiệm tuyệt vời nhất của mình trong chuyến đi này. Được hỏi han từ khi chưa vào ở cho đến khi về Hà Nội rồi vẫn được chị chủ hỏi han về dịch vụ. Vừa vào đã thấy rất hài lòng về sự nhiệt tình và thân thiện của chị lễ tân, phòng ở siêu sạch và đẹp, thoáng. Có phần ăn sáng miễn phí nhưng siêu ngon, cao lầu ngon hơn cả ăn ở trong phố cổ Hội An, crepe xoài cũng ngon tuyệt. Mọi người rất thân thiện từ chú bảo vệ, cô tạp vụ, chị lễ tân, cô đầu bếp,.. Ai nhìn thấy mình cũng gật đầu chào và mỉm cười. Chị lễ tân luôn hỏi về dịch vụ có ổn không, ngủ có ngon ko, có vấn đề gì không. :D bọn mình đồ khá nhiều và đi xe máy, mọi người còn hỗ trợ bê đồ và buộc hành lý vào xe nữa. Nói chung nếu có cơ hội quay lại Hội An chắc chắn sẽ ở lại ở đây. Chấm điểm 10 +++. Chỉ tiếc ko có thời gian tắm hồ bơi :D Mong Summer Holiday Villa luôn giữ phong độ như thế này. Cảm ơn rất nhiều <3

reviews.title: Zeer goede ervaring.
reviews.positives: Goede plek en goede prijs, het zwembad is mooi en er zijn gratis fietsen

reviews.title: Brilliant stay
reviews.text: It was a wonderful stay. One of the best check ins, they provided very full inromation. The room is very new. Crystall clear swimming pool. Also they provide complimentary bikes. Staff is very friendly. Highly recommend this place for a stay!
reviews.response:
Thank you so much for your wonderful review 😊

We’re delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay, especially the smooth check-in, the room, and our swimming pool. It’s also great to know you liked the complimentary bikes and found our team friendly and helpful.

Your recommendation truly means a lot to us. We hope to welcome you back again soon!

reviews.title: また泊まりたい！最高！
reviews.positives: 部屋の香りがとってもいい香りで、リラックスできました！スタッフの皆さんもフレンドリーで、素敵な時間を過ごせました。

reviews.title: 住宿體驗尚可
reviews.positives: 住宿價格算便宜，服務人員態度也很親切，有一位女性服務人員會說中文，也會協助安排接送及按摩，價格也蠻實惠的。
reviews.negatives: 我住在一樓，蚊子很多，也沒有提供電蚊香，只有電蚊拍，一個晚上我至少打死十隻蚊子。距離會安老街有段距離，需要搭Grab前往。

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 가격대비 너무 좋았고 다음에도 호이안 갈시 숙소잡을듯
reviews.negatives: 주위 먹거리 커피숍이나 등등 없다는게 단점

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: הצוות מדהים עזרו בכל מה שהינו צריכים , המלון במיקום מעולה החדרים מצוחצחים הבריכה מעולה ! חוויה מצויינת

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Địa điểm dễ tìm thuận tiện đi lại
reviews.negatives: Đến ks lúc trời mưa to không có bảo vệ hoặc nhân viên hỗ trợ. Khách phải tự tìm ô (dù) và tự xách đồ chạy mưa. Ks k có thang máy. Cách âm không tốt

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Rộng rãi

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Nhân viên lịch sự, thân thiện, nhiệt tình. 
Villa khá yên tĩnh.
reviews.negatives:
Tivi không có kết nối internet. Gia đình có bé nhỏ muốn xem tivi nhưng ko có chương trình xem. Đây là một điểm trừ.

Ổ cắm điện ngay trên đầu giường, nằm xuống đầu đụng ổ điện khá nguy hiểm.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Đa số phòng rộng thoáng, giường lớn đủ rộng cho gđ nhỏ khi có 2 NL và 1-2 bé dưới 5t, có phòng gia đình thoáng rộng
reviews.negatives: Nên có bữa sáng và thêm nhiều xe đạp hơn

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Chủ home siêu nhiệt tình và thân thiện

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Khu vực đầy đủ dịch vụ đi kèm

reviews.title: A great holiday 🌸
reviews.positives:
Phòng ốc mới, sạch sẽ
Nhân viên thân thiện, hỗ trợ nhiệt tình gia đình mình trong suốt chuyến đi 💓
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Rất ấn tượng
reviews.positives: Sạch sẽ, ý tứ phục vụ cho khách.
reviews.negatives: không có

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Các bạn nhân viên vô cùng dễ thương. Vị trí ở khoảng giữa biển An Bàng và Phố cổ, di chuyển mỗi đầu khoảng 2-3km khá tiện. Xung quanh có nhiều hàng quán. Villa gần cánh đồng, vào mùa lúa chín rất đẹp và thanh bình.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nv thân thiện, nhiệt tình, không gian đẹp gọn gàng

reviews.title: Hài lòng
reviews.positives: Nhân viên nhiệt tình. Phòng đẹp (pool view). Giường lớn êm

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Sạch sẽ nhân viên vui vẻ 10đ

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Phòng thoáng mát sạch sẽ, chủ nhiệt tình mình rất hài lòng, sẽ quay lại lần sau ạ

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Địa điểm gần trung tâm,  gần biển

reviews.title: Happy
reviews.positives: Villa sạch sẽ có bể bơi tiện lợi , nhân viên nhiệt tình thân thiện

reviews.title: Phòng và không gian sạch sẽ
reviews.positives:
Villa được bảo trì cẩn thận và rất mới, phòng ngủ và khuôn viên sạch sẽ và hiện đại, nhân viên cũng luôn niềm nở, gần gũi. Không gian xung quanh có vẻ yên bình và phù hợp để thư giãn. Phòng nghỉ nhỏ xinh, đủ tiện nghi, giường ngủ êm ái mang đến cảm giác dễ chịu. Chi phí lưu trú ở đây rất hợp lý so với chất lượng dịch vụ.
Nhìn chung, Villa để lại cho chúng tôi nhiều ấn tượng tốt đẹp.
reviews.negatives: Không có gì để chê.

reviews.title: Dịch vụ tốt, tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Lần đầu được trải nghiệm dịch vụ tại villa nhưng vô cùng ưng ý, trên cả mong đợi.Dịch vụ tốt, phòng đẹp, nhân viên thân thiện, nhiệt tình, giá rẻ. Địa điểm lý tưởng để ở tại Hội An, tiện lợi, gần các địa điểm ăn uống. Chuyến đi vô cùng tuyệt vời và đáng nhớ. Lần sau quay lại nhất định vẫn chọn SUMMER HOLIDAY VILLA

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Villa sạch sẽ, gần trung tâm Hội An. Giá rẻ mà có hồ bơi rộng nên mình khá thích. Chủ nhà hỗ trợ nhiệt tình, mình dùng hết khăn thì có người đến hỗ trợ dù đang tối khuya. Rất hài lòng với villa

reviews.title: Dịch vụ cùng phòng ở xuất sắc xứng đáng được 10d nè. Mn ai vào HA chơi thì ghé vào ủng hộ villa nha
reviews.positives: Dịch vụ ok, phòng ở sạch sẽ gọn gàng, nhân viên thân thiện. Villa có Bida, than nướng, hồ bơi rất hợp để vui chơi cùng với gia đình và bạn bè. Không gian yên tĩnh thích hợp cho những ai có những ngày bận rộn hoặc mệt mỏi sau những ngày làm việc thì nơi này mình thấy cũng rất thích hợp cho những bạn thích sự tĩnh lặng đấy. View đẹp nha mọi người, bản thân sau này có cơ hội trở lại HA thì sẽ book căn này nữa.

reviews.title: Bir daha kalırmısın diye sorsalar , cevabım evet olurdu
reviews.positives: Temiz , ferah , çalışanları güler yüzlü , toplu taşımaya ve eğlence mekanlarına yakındı.

reviews.title: Oplevelsen værd!
reviews.positives: Havde et soloophold på Sunora Villa, super afslappet stemning – jeg fik lavet noget arbejde ved poolen og tog derefter deres cykel ud for at udforske byen. Personalet var super venligt, og Tien er virkelig hjælpsom. Kan varmt anbefales.

reviews.title: Smuk villa og fantastisk service fra Junie hele vejen igennem.
reviews.positives: Tak til Junie for den store hjælp fra begyndelsen til slutningen af vores ophold. Dejlig villa i Hoi An.

reviews.title: Cosy stay in Hoi An
reviews.positives: Clean, large rooms, beautiful view, comfy bed.
reviews.negatives: The only thing was that the room is not very well isolated. So you can very well hear the occasional noise from the street and roosters at 3-4 am. If you have earplugs it’s fine!

reviews.title: Beautiful Villa with Excellent service
reviews.positives:
The villa is located in a quiet neighborhood, yet very close to main attractions (20 -30) mins walk from the ancient city town. 
The villa has spacious rooms with balconies. The rooms were clean, comfortable, with fluffy pillows, soft matresses, and complete amneties.
There are few authentic, less touristy local eateries close to the hotel. 
The hotel also has free bikes (4 of them on first come first serve) that you can take.
The owner is very friendly, humble, and great to talk to according to my husband and son. We loved the food places that he recommended. The staffs are equally friendly and accomodating and wouldn't mind coming back.
The pool is smaller than it appears in the picture. However, it is very clean and was not an issue since we barely used it.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
I want to thank the owner with his effective responses and fast solving issue with the cleanness of the room .
The room is spacious with balcony ,facing the street . It was offered water,coffee . Amenities in the shower section. Advantage of the big window of the show,humidity goes away fast.
The matras was comfortable.
The room wasn't new ,few places needed more care. 
Although the room was facing the street,after 23:00 it was quite . 
But very loud noice from cafe and neighbors.
Seebeds cushions require to be cleaned ,they are grey and in mould . 
Nice area for dining next to reception.

reviews.title: Very good value stay in Hoi An.
reviews.positives: Good value. Everything in the room worked well. Nice pool. Quiet environment. Helpful staff. A short grab ride to the beach or old town.
reviews.negatives: Do expect quite a bit of wear and tear of fixtures.

reviews.title: Great location,  out of the crowded center, but close enough for convenience! Lovely setting!
reviews.positives:
We chose Sunora because of the location. Out of the really busy town, but close enough to get there within 10 mins in a grab taxi for less than £1.20! Or you can walk/cycle easily enough. The staff were very welcoming and helpful, they booked our basket boat trip and airport transfer and were always on hand if we needed anything. Laundry service was a great price and very fast. We have 2 big bags full back within the same day! We had 2 interconnecting rooms with plenty of space and comfortable beds. The area is very  peaceful meaning you get a good night's sleep! 

The swimming pool is a lovely bonus to cool down, very clean and comfortable sun beds and towels provided.  The drinks are very reasonably priced and brekfast was plentiful. 

Tip: Go to the lantern workshop about 250m down the road, it is in a local families garden,  away from the crowds and the ladies were so patient and kind with our children! Its called Duh Thanh! The ones in the center are very busy!!
reviews.negatives: Although the rooms were clean, they are tired in places and maybe in need of a little update, fresh paint and tidy up of the bathroom.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
The hotel is new and clean. It locates in a peaceful area, quite close to the Hoian old town (about 10 minutes by bike). There were free bikes for guests to use during their stay. The staff were friendly and helpful. Price was good.
We had 2 nights here and would have stayed longer if we had time.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very clean and friendly place. Excellent value. Good location. Lots of eateries nearby. Would definitely stay there again.

reviews.title: Top!
reviews.positives: Its was just as you expact, people where amazing and its so nice!
reviews.negatives: The people!

reviews.title: Clean and modern stay with excellent staff
reviews.positives: Clean and modern. Nice location in Hoi An (does require a Grab to get to old town/main area). Multiple nice eateries within walking distance. Free bikes for hire. Staff very helpful in giving ideas for activities, in booking tours/tickets.
reviews.negatives: Window was not sealed properly and lots of water leaked in to the room overnight during a storm. Staff were very helpful in helping to clean.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The peaceful location and still close to the old town and the beach

reviews.title: Such a pleasant stay and the staff were sooo sweet 💗💗
reviews.positives: The staff, the beds, the pool, it was all great!
reviews.negatives: Loved it all

reviews.title: Best Villa I stayed at so far
reviews.positives: Everything was perfect - coming from a german ;)

reviews.title: Tranquil, very comfortable with wonderful staff.
reviews.positives: Perfectly located in a more peaceful part of Hoi An, very calm and comfortable from the minute I arrived, the staff were all wonderful and kind and really made my stay special. My room was at the back of the property, perfect for doing some work at the desk during the day, with excellent wifi throughout the week. I recommend Sunora for anyone seeking a peaceful stay within an easy bike-ride or leisurely walk to the town centre, and very close to the rice-fields, also local coffee and food options on the same street.

reviews.title: A Hidden Charm
reviews.positives:
Sunora is a very charming place. The front desk, the swimming pool and the small garden, gives a very nice impression when you arrive at the place. I was taken to a room on the 3rd floor, as they were fully booked. A spacious room, nicely decorated,  a good bathroom and a balcony.
Everything very clean. 
In the end to be on that floor was very nice, towards the side of the building. The birds were there all the time, singing. 
I felt like I was in a little village, and yet in town (1,5kms), but not in the middle of the crowds.
They have bicycles.
Everyone is very nice.
Tien the owner is a very nice young man, an intreperner, who does his best to have everything as it is supposed to be. 
I wish the best for Sunora Villa, and all the team.
100% recommend 
P.S - There was a difference in the dollars I had paid, and Tien gave me the difference. Very honest.
reviews.negatives: Because New Year two of the days had a high price😊

reviews.title: Small intimate super nice hotel in walking distance from Hoi An Old town… just perfect!
reviews.positives: Really calm and pretty hotel and super nice staff

reviews.title: Fantastic kind sweet helpful staff
reviews.positives: Location and rooms only £17 including breakfast great staff

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Excellent service!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Stunning property very peaceful lovely stay

reviews.title: Lovely little hotel at great price
reviews.positives:
Lovely and clean hotel with a really nice pool and outdoor area. It was a really good location in a quieter area out the centre but still close enough to reach everything by bike/car within 5 mins. 
Bed was comfy and room was clean with a nice balcony! The staff are super friendly and helpful with any queries you have. Thanks so much for having us!
reviews.negatives: Can be very loud when it rains!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Location was great, the hosts are very nice and helpful. we had a lovely stay, and definitely come back here later!
There is a nice swimming pool, where u can cooldown after a long day.

reviews.title: We really enjoyed our stay.
reviews.positives: We really enjoyed our stay. The room was super clean, bright, and easy to find.Thanks to Linh, and Le for being so kind — especially Linh for all the great tips.We only stayed one night, but Emma and I will definitely come back next year!

reviews.title: Very recommend for the family / backpacker to start your discovery in Hoi An.
reviews.positives:
I have a very good stay in Sunora villa.
They are all friendly and give the good local trip suggestion.
My family enjoy everything in the villa especially the swimming pool.
Even it is not too big but enough for my little girl.
I like it because it is good for price and comfortable reception.
Very recommend for the family / backpacker to start your discovery in Hoi An.
reviews.negatives: No.

reviews.title: Perfect!
reviews.positives: We loved our stay at Sunora Villa, the property is  locally owned, quiet, clean, comfortable and the staff are super friendly! They also offer free bike hire which is ideal for exploring Hoi an! I would highly recommend staying here!
reviews.negatives: Zero, nothing!

reviews.title: We had a great stay in Sunora Villa, great facilites, staff and very clean.
reviews.positives: Basically can’t fault this place, has everything you would need in terms of services, great pool and such friendly staff!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Our stay was absolutely wonderful. A big thank you to Luna and Taylor for their attentiveness and responsiveness to every request. We highly recommend this place!

reviews.title: Lovely stay at Sunora Villa!
reviews.positives: The villa was clean, comfy, and in a great location. The staff were so sweet — especially Thien, who was super helpful. We loved the free bikes, fun cooking class, and airport pick-up and drop-off. Everything was easy and relaxing. Would love to come back!

reviews.title: Loved it here!
reviews.positives: We booked it in last minute but turned out really nice place to stay. Staff were really helpful and friendly and they helped to book the car to the airports with good price. The room was clean and comfy. Would totally come back!

reviews.title: A peaceful, friendly getaway that felt like home can’t wait to return!
reviews.positives: The villa was super cozy and peaceful, perfect for relaxing. The staff were warm, welcoming, and very helpful. The pool was clean and great for cooling off. We also really enjoyed getting to know the friendly owners!
reviews.negatives: Honestly, nothing major; maybe just a wish we could have stayed longer!

reviews.title: Excellent hotel in a great location
reviews.positives: Great location with restaurants and bars nearby, 7 minute moped ride from the beach or old town. Free bikes provided. The room was clean and the bed super comfortable. The hosts were really kind and gave us water and mango on a hot day by the pool. The pool was clean and really quiet so was easy to get a sun lounger.
reviews.negatives: The only negative would be there is no furniture on the balcony but there is a nice court yard outside to sit and chill.

reviews.title: A pleasant stay
reviews.positives:
We had a lovely time at Sunora Villa Hoi An. The villa looks recently renovated and is very well taken care of.
The staff was friendly and always helpful.
It's surrounded by lots of greenery, which adds to the peaceful vibe. Our room was cozy, and the bed was comfortable.
Considering the price, this place has a good price in the area. It offers good quality at a very reasonable rate.
We highly recommend this villa and would happily return on our next visit to Hoi An.
reviews.negatives: Nothing.

reviews.title: The stay is more than my expectation, good price. The vibe is really amazing and chill.
reviews.positives:
The location is ideal where it's near both central area and the beach.
They have free bikes so it's convenient. Price is cheappp.
the welcome letter is touching.

reviews.title: Villa is very beautiful and close to the center. Great experiences. Highly recommended!
reviews.positives: Everything is wonderful! I had a short but wonderful vacation in Hoi An and especially at the Villa. The Villa is very airy and clean. Convenient location: near streets and eating places. Only 2.5km from An Bang beach. I will definitely choose my villa again if I return to Hoi An. Thank you so much!
reviews.negatives: Nothing!

reviews.title: I had a great experience at the villa. Villa is airy, clean, with many trees. Villa has a billiards
reviews.positives: Everything
reviews.negatives: Nothing
